name: rtime-library-gateway
description: Unified library access gateway MCP: one permission gate and audit over rtime read tools and the three narrow-write settings tools.

interface.shortDescription: One gated entry point for reading the rtime brain library and writing the three narrow settings tools.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Library Gateway is a thin orchestration MCP that subprocesses the existing rtime read CLIs (brain library, DocPack, citation, hub, context, profile, review, automation, runtime) and the three narrow-write settings tools (context sources, memory candidates, reminders) behind one central permission gate and metadata-only audit. personal-data gating and output redaction are policy switches, both OFF in the current single-owner deployment (personal-data accessible, output not redacted) and re-enablable without code changes.
defaultPrompt: Search the brain index through the gateway.
Register a study reminder through the gateway settings tool.
